project_type: Shopify theme (Dawn-based) - single section being upgraded with premium features
build_system: None - Shopify theme files are uploaded directly via admin code editor (no compile step). The user pastes files into Shopify's online code editor.
test_framework: None - validation is done via JSON schema parsing, Liquid tag-balance counts, range-math checks, and feature usage greps against the source files.
build_command: None (no local build). Validation: python3 -c 'import json; json.load(open(...))' on extracted schema
test_command: None. Verification consists of: (a) JSON schema parses, (b) every {% if %}/{% for %}/{% case %}/{% comment %}/{% capture %}/{% form %}/{% style %}/{% javascript %}/{% schema %} has matching close tag (note: {% liquid %} is a tag-style block with no endliquid - excluded), (c) every range setting satisfies (max-min)/step <= 100 and (default-min) % step == 0, (d) all 46 hp_ settings are referenced at least once in liquid body, CSS, or JS.
verification_instructions: Run the validation script at .agents/tasks/task-ship-premium-header/validate.py on the three target files (sections/header.liquid, assets/header-premium.css, assets/header-premium.js). Exit code 0 means pass. The script checks: schema JSON validity, hp_ count == 46, range math, liquid block balance, hp_ usage coverage, no 'null' literals, no width="auto".
setup_instructions: No setup needed. Working directory is /projects/sandbox/Render. The phase 5 source files have been pre-fetched from GitHub raw URLs and cached at .agents/phases-cache/p5/ (gitignored). They are: header.liquid (1352 lines), header-premium.css (809 lines), header-premium.js (179 lines).
environment_constraints: Network mode: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES. git fetch via the gateway origin fails with 'Missing header field, please provide AuthToken' - therefore branches cannot be checked out via git. Workaround: raw GitHub URLs work via curl with --cacert /etc/pki/tls/certs/ca-bundle.crt (system bundle). Default curl fails with TLS trust-anchor error unless CURL_CA_BUNDLE is set. The 5 phase branches (feature/premium-header-phase-1..5) exist on origin and have all been fetched into .agents/phases-cache/. The PRs (#5-#9) are open but never merged - main currently only has Ignore.zip.
contribution_requirements: User specified rules from a 'Senior Shopify Developer' master prompt: (1) range math (max-min)/step <= 100 AND (default-min)%step == 0, with all numeric (not strings); (2) plain English labels for new hp_ settings, no t: keys; (3) JSON validity (no trailing commas, no comments); (4) CSS scoped to .header-wrapper--premium; (5) backward compat - hp_enable_premium=false MUST behave like default Dawn; (6) Liquid block balance; (7) no JavaScript 'null' literal in Liquid (use 'nil'); (8) no image width="auto"; (9) Shopify editor events handled (shopify:section:load/unload); (10) hp_ prefix on all new settings; (11) preserve all existing Dawn t: keys, settings, and behaviors.
key_patterns: Pattern in Phase 5: master toggle hp_enable_premium gates everything. CSS file and JS file are conditionally loaded only when premium is on (via {% if section.settings.hp_enable_premium %}). All hp_ values are exposed as either CSS custom properties (--hp-*) on .section-header in a {% style %} block, or as data-hp-* attributes on the wrapper element, or as conditional {% if %} renders inside the markup. CSS uses .header-wrapper--premium scope plus [data-hp-*] attribute selectors and CSS variables. JavaScript wraps everything in IIFE, listens to shopify:section:load/unload, and handles hover-trigger dropdowns + bottom-nav search trigger + cart-count sync.
relevant_files: main:/Ignore.zip (existing) - leave alone, do not delete
target:sections/header.liquid (new file to be added to main from phase-5 branch)
target:assets/header-premium.css (new file to be added to main from phase-5 branch)
target:assets/header-premium.js (new file to be added to main from phase-5 branch)
reference:.agents/phases-cache/dawn-header.liquid - upstream Dawn header for sanity-comparison (638 lines)
directory_structure: Workspace root (/projects/sandbox/Render) currently contains only Ignore.zip (a website backup zip the user wants kept) and .git/. After this task it will additionally contain sections/header.liquid, assets/header-premium.css, assets/header-premium.js, and .agents/ (task state). Shopify theme convention: section liquid files go in sections/, asset files (CSS/JS/images) go in assets/.

reality_check_summary.verdict: Phase 5 is REAL and SUBSTANTIALLY COMPLETE. The earlier suspicion that the agent fabricated work was unfounded for Phase 5.
reality_check_summary.hp_settings_in_schema: 46 unique hp_ ids found - matches the claimed count exactly
reality_check_summary.liquid_block_balance: All balanced. if=54/54, for=1/1, case=1/1, comment=11/11, capture=4/4, form=2/2, style=1/1, javascript=1/1, schema=1/1. Note: {% liquid %} appears 6 times with 0 endliquid - this is correct (it is a tag-style block with no closer).
reality_check_summary.range_math_check: All 14 range settings (11 hp_ + 3 Dawn) pass: (max-min)/step <= 100 and (default-min)%step == 0
reality_check_summary.feature_usage_coverage: All 46 hp_ ids are referenced at least once in the liquid body. CSS uses CSS custom properties (--hp-*) and data attribute selectors (data-hp-*) which transitively cover them. JS handles hover-trigger, bottom-nav, and editor events.
reality_check_summary.dawn_compatibility: All original Dawn schema ids preserved (0 missing). All Dawn t: keys preserved for existing settings. Premium gating correctly hides everything when hp_enable_premium=false.
minor_observations: Phase 5 wraps Dawn's 2nd header-search render with a hp_show_inline_search toggle - both modal IDs (Search-In-Modal-1 and Search-In-Modal) match Dawn's stock pattern, so no duplicate-id collision.
No null literals in Liquid. No image width="auto". No trailing commas in schema.
reality_check_summary.issues_found: None blocking. Phase 5 files can be shipped to main as-is.
